_comment: Template for config/ai_config.json. Copy this file to config/ai_config.json and edit for your machine. The real config is gitignored because it contains machine-specific paths (e.g. local Razhan CT2 model_path) that should never be committed. load_ai_config() in python/ai/provider.py falls back to built-in defaults if config/ai_config.json is missing, so the server will still start without it — but STT will fall back to a generic Whisper 'base' model instead of Razhan.
_ipa_comment: Tier 3 acoustic alignment: wav2vec2 is the ONLY IPA engine. The former text-based providers (local/epitran, openai, ollama) and the southern_kurdish_arabic_to_ipa fallback have been removed. The ipa block below is informational; the code path is hard-wired via ai.forced_align.Aligner to the model declared in the wav2vec2 block at the bottom of this file.

ortho._comment: Orthographic transcription (e.g. Kurdish Arabic script). Razhan is the canonical SDH source model, but ortho.model_path must point at a local CTranslate2 conversion directory — do NOT put a HuggingFace repo id here. Convert razhan/whisper-base-sdh first with `ct2-transformers-converter --model razhan/whisper-base-sdh --output_dir /path/to/razhan-ct2`, then set model_path to that output directory. Razhan Hameed and Sina Ahmadi et al. publish the Southern Kurdish ASR models at https://huggingface.co/razhan/whisper-base-sdh and https://huggingface.co/razhan/whisper-small-me, with training code at https://github.com/DOLMA-NLP/asr; whisper-small-me reports WER 0.4930 / CER 0.1718 on SDH. DOLMA's Whisper fine-tuning uses `--language="persian"`, so the correct Whisper inference token for these Razhan SDH models is `fa`, not `sdh`/`sd`; LocalWhisperProvider defensively maps existing `sd`/`sdh` configs to `fa`. The defaults below keep the anti-cascade guard enabled: tuned VAD on, condition_on_previous_text=false, compression_ratio_threshold=1.8. initial_prompt primes the Whisper decoder — useful on elicited word-list recordings. refine_lexemes=true enables a short-clip Whisper pass over every concept after Tier-2 forced alignment; adds extra runtime but yields cleaner per-lexeme text in tiers.ortho_words.
